short_definition: The NARS-owned admission contract for send, enqueue, and steer operator input.
description: OperatorMessageAdmission makes operator input semantics explicit. It distinguishes immediate send, durable enqueue, and interruptive steer/directive modes, including queue position, cancellation, and delivery result, so surfaces no longer invent their own rules.

authority.notes: The operator input admission concept is already implemented at protocol/runtime level and documented in the operator admission doc.

examples: send when idle, enqueue after active turn, steer to interrupt
counterexamples: browser-only optimistic queueing with no NARS acknowledgement

confidence.basis: The operator admission doc already defines send/enqueue/steer and the NARS queue persistence path.
